failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG mixture solidifies below 66°C causing complete flow blockage
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire 16m length with redundant heating zones

failure_modes.cause: Re=7 laminar flow provides poor heat transfer, hot spots develop in 16m coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Install multiple temperature sensors along reactor length

failure_modes.cause: Deep eutectic solvent degrades elastomer seals at 120°C over time
failure_modes.mitigation: Use PTFE/FFKM seals rated for ionic liquids at high temperature

single_points_of_failure: 16m reactor coil - any blockage stops production
Single BPR valve - failure causes pressure loss
validation_experiments: Cool DES solution from 120°C to 20°C in 0.75mm tubing; measure crystallization temperature and pressure rise
Run tracer study with thermocouples every 2m along reactor coil to map temperature profile at Q=0.236 mL/min
Pump DES at 120°C for 72h continuous operation; monitor seal integrity and pressure stability
